arts.ttl: 8 Celtic fringe men braced for Aberdeen cameos as Brendan Rodgers to field second string
arts.sum: The Hoops boss will rest his big hitters for the trip to Pittodrie as he casts one eye towards the Scottish Cup Final

arts.ttl: Graeme Shinnie adamant Rangers collapse not down to Celtic distraction as skipper gets honest over Hibs chase
arts.sum: The Dons were hammered 4-0 in Govan after shipping four goals in the second half as Barry Ferguson got his long-awaited Ibrox win
